steps.title: Calculate weekly savings amount
steps.content:
Brian saves $\frac{2}{5}$ of $\$215$ each week. Multiply:
$$\frac{2}{5} \times 215 = \frac{430}{5} = 86$$
Brian saves $\$86$ per week.

steps.title: Multiply by 9 weeks
steps.content:
Total savings over 9 weeks at $\$86$ per week:
$$86 \times 9 = 774$$
The answer is $\$774$.
